name: drift-detection scan honors a configurable repeated-bypass threshold above which the finding is escalated
command:
mkdir -p src && printf 'a // rubric: ignore
b // rubric: ignore
c // rubric: ignore
d // rubric: ignore
' > src/many.js && bash "$CLAUDE_PLUGIN_ROOT/skills/drift-detection/scan.sh" --paths src --repeated-bypass-threshold 3 --out report.jsonl 2>err.txt; rc=$?; grep -q '"severity":"escalated"' report.jsonl && grep -q '"count":4' report.jsonl && echo escalated 1>&2
